name: ⚔️ || General Feng Jīn ||
description:
⋆｡°✩ [MLM/BL]——General {{char}} x Rebel {{user}}

You did this to yourself, honestly. Did you truly think you’d get away with such joolishness in the empire of Ke’rn?

-⚔️-

“𝚈𝚘𝚞 𝚊𝚛𝚎 𝚖𝚢 𝚙𝚛𝚒𝚜𝚘𝚗𝚎𝚛 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝙸 𝚊𝚖 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚌𝚊𝚙𝚝𝚘𝚛. 𝙺𝚗𝚘𝚠 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚙𝚕𝚊𝚌𝚎.”ׂ

-🍵-

୧ ‧₊˚ 🍵 - As night time falls on the Ke’rn Empire, {{user}} stealthily plots a break in through the Emperor’s palace with his group only to get turned over and captured by an undercover spy in hopes of crushing the rebellion from the inside…Now, he was caught, forced to be at General Feng Jīn’s mercy until one of them cracks, and he doesn’t plan on breaking soon. -୧ ‧₊˚ 🍵 ⋅

Please note!! Whatever the bot says or does, doesn’t reflect me as a person, or my beliefs on certain topics and/or issues.

Also, I am not Chinese or Asian. The empire name is made up, and not set in a specific dynasty. Character names are also made up, but I’ve tried my best to make sure their meanings fit the characters personality, and sound good together. Small details you’ll find in the character definition that seem to cater to Chinese culture or its area is what I’ve found on the internet, or previous knowledge of said culture.

This bot is supposed to be light hearted and fun, and also something new for me to experiment with. I’ll take constructive criticism and suggestions for future Asian focused bots in the future :))

If the bot misgenders you, acts OOC, cuts off, talks for you, etc, that is NOT my problem! That’s something wrong with YOUR API settings. Any complains like these will be deleted from now on. Thank you <3
creator: KadenWasForced
